en.commentary: Amazon Echo Studio (2nd Gen) keeps first because the spatial audio rendering, the Alexa+ integration that finally makes voice queries useful for shopping and calendar tasks, and the Eero mesh integration are still the spec combination that closes the case for any Amazon-ecosystem buyer. Amazon's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the Echo Studio at $179.99 (regular $199.99), which is the cheapest it has been since launch. Sonos Era 100 at second remains the right answer for buyers who prioritize music quality over voice assistant capability and who have other Sonos devices, and Sonos's app finally feels stable after the 2024 disaster. Apple HomePod (2nd Gen) at third is the Apple-ecosystem pick that genuinely sounds the best in solo configuration. Google Nest Audio at fourth is the dark horse value play after the May 6 firmware update added Gemini integration that closes the AI-assistant gap to Alexa+. The 5/8 read is that the smart speaker market is stable, Echo Studio's Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and Google's Gemini firmware update is genuinely the most consequential category news of the week.

highlights.title: Amazon Echo Studio at $179.99 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Amazon's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale. Spatial audio plus Alexa+ integration plus Eero mesh at $180 closes the value argument decisively for any Amazon-ecosystem buyer. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 sounds the best of any standalone smart speaker for music
highlights.body: For buyers who prioritize music quality over voice assistant features and who have other Sonos products, the Era 100 stereo pair configuration produces sound that no other smart speaker matches. Sonos's app stability is now genuinely fixed after the 2024 saga.

highlights.title: Google Nest Audio May 6 Gemini firmware closes the AI assistant gap
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update on Nest Audio replaced the legacy Google Assistant with full Gemini integration, which finally closes the conversational-AI gap to Alexa+. For Google-ecosystem buyers this is now a credible smart speaker recommendation, which it was not a quarter ago.

zh-tw.commentary:
Amazon Echo Studio (2nd Gen) 第一名守住，空間音訊渲染、Alexa+ 整合在語音購物跟行事曆查詢終於變實用、Eero mesh 整合，這個規格組合對 Amazon 生態圈買家還是首選。Amazon Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 Echo Studio 殺到 $179.99（原 $199.99），是上市以來最低。

台灣 Echo Studio 海運大概 NT$5,800 上下，沒公司貨但已經用 Amazon 服務的人會買。

第二名 Sonos Era 100 還是音樂品質優先勝過語音助理功能、又有其他 Sonos 設備的人首選，Sonos App 在 2024 年崩盤之後終於穩了。

第三名 Apple HomePod (2nd Gen) 是 Apple 生態圈選擇，單機配置真的是音質最好的。

第四名 Google Nest Audio 是 5/6 韌體更新加上 Gemini 整合後變成黑馬性價比選擇。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，智慧喇叭市場穩定，Echo Studio 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死價值論述，Google 的 Gemini 韌體更新是這週品類最重要的新聞。

highlights.title: Amazon Echo Studio $179.99 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: Amazon Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 春季所有促銷。空間音訊加 Alexa+ 整合加 Eero mesh 在 $180（約 NT$5,670）整個價值論述完全壓死，Amazon 生態圈買家直接下手。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 是單機智慧喇叭聽音樂最好聽的
highlights.body: 音樂品質優先勝過語音助理功能、又有其他 Sonos 產品的買家，Era 100 立體聲對配置做出來的聲音其他智慧喇叭做不到。Sonos App 在 2024 年崩盤之後終於修穩。

highlights.title: Google Nest Audio 5/6 Gemini 韌體補上 AI 助理差距
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體更新讓 Nest Audio 把舊版 Google Assistant 換成完整 Gemini 整合，補上跟 Alexa+ 的對話式 AI 差距。Google 生態圈買家現在這是可信智慧喇叭推薦，一季前還不是這樣。

en.commentary: ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium keeps first because the integrated quality air monitor, the SmartSensor wireless support, and the genuinely best HomeKit/Matter integration in the category are still the spec combination that closes the case for any serious smart home buyer. ecobee's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the Smart Thermostat Premium at $219.99 (regular $249.99), which is the cheapest it has been since launch. Google Nest Learning Thermostat (4th gen) at second remains the right answer for buyers who specifically want the Nest learning algorithm and Google Home integration. Honeywell Home T9 Smart Thermostat at third is still the budget-friendly pick under $200. Amazon Smart Thermostat at fourth is the value tier for Alexa-ecosystem buyers. The 5/8 read is that the smart thermostat market is stable heading into peak cooling-season demand, ecobee's Memorial Day price locks first place, and the only real category news is Google quietly announcing Nest 5th gen development for Q3.

highlights.title: ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium at $219.99 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: ecobee's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale. Integrated air quality monitor plus SmartSensor support plus Matter/HomeKit integration at $220 closes the value argument decisively for any smart home buyer. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Google Nest Learning Thermostat 4th gen is still the algorithm winner
highlights.body: Nest's learning algorithm genuinely produces lower energy bills than ecobee's schedule-based approach in households where occupancy patterns vary. For Google Home ecosystem buyers who want set-and-forget operation, the Nest 4th gen is the unambiguous pick.

highlights.title: Honeywell Home T9 is the only smart thermostat under $200 worth buying
highlights.body: Multi-zone room sensors plus geofencing plus Apple HomeKit support at $179 is genuinely uncontested in the value tier. For buyers who refuse to pay ecobee or Nest premium prices but still want real smart thermostat functionality, the T9 is the smartest call.

zh-tw.commentary:
ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium 第一名守住，整合空氣品質監測、SmartSensor 無線支援、品類最強 HomeKit/Matter 整合，這個規格組合對認真的智慧家庭買家還是首選。ecobee Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 Smart Thermostat Premium 殺到 $219.99（原 $249.99），是上市以來最低。

台灣這個品類意義不大，台灣家庭多半用分離式冷氣，恆溫器這個產品形態主要還是給有中央空調的別墅或商辦。海運過來大概 NT$7,500 上下，玩家組裝智慧家庭的人會買。

第二名 Google Nest Learning Thermostat (4th gen) 是想要 Nest 學習演算法跟 Google Home 整合的人首選。

第三名 Honeywell Home T9 Smart Thermostat 是 $200 以下預算友善選擇。

第四名 Amazon Smart Thermostat 是 Alexa 生態圈性價比段。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，智慧恆溫器市場踩進冷氣旺季需求，ecobee 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死第一，這週唯一品類新聞是 Google 安靜地公告 Nest 第 5 代 Q3 開發中。

highlights.title: ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium $219.99 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: ecobee Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 春季所有促銷。整合空氣品質監測加 SmartSensor 支援加 Matter/HomeKit 整合在 $220（約 NT$6,930）整個價值論述完全壓死，智慧家庭買家直接下手。

highlights.title: Google Nest Learning Thermostat 第 4 代還是演算法贏家
highlights.body: Nest 學習演算法在使用者作息變動的家庭真的能做出比 ecobee 排程式更低的電費。Google Home 生態圈買家要設定完就放著的人，Nest 第 4 代是首選毫無懸念。

highlights.title: Honeywell Home T9 是 $200 以下唯一值得買的智慧恆溫器
highlights.body: 多區域房間感應器加地理圍欄加 Apple HomeKit 支援在 $179（約 NT$5,640）真的是性價比段沒對手。不想花 ecobee 跟 Nest 旗艦價但還要真的智慧恆溫器功能的買家，T9 是最聰明選擇。

en.commentary: Apple Watch Ultra 2 keeps first because the precision dual-frequency GPS, the genuinely best-in-class on-watch app ecosystem, and the new May 6 watchOS update that added the bloodflow-based hydration metric still close the case for any Apple-ecosystem buyer. Apple's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the Ultra 2 at $749 (regular $799), which is the cheapest non-Black Friday Ultra 2 price of the year. Garmin Fenix 8 at second remains the right answer for buyers who prioritize multi-week battery life and the deepest sport metrics in the category, and Garmin's Connect IQ store is still genuinely the best smart watch ecosystem outside Apple. Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra at third is the Android pick that finally produces real battery life beyond 60 hours after the May 6 firmware update. Google Pixel Watch 4 at four is the value-conscious Android pick. The 5/8 read is that the smart watch market is stable, Apple's Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and Samsung's battery-life firmware fix is genuinely the most consequential category update of the week.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 at $749 is the cheapest non-Black Friday price of the year
highlights.body: Apple's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale. Dual-frequency precision GPS plus the watchOS app ecosystem plus the new hydration metric at $749 closes the value argument decisively for any Apple-ecosystem buyer. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 multi-week battery life is uncontested for outdoor athletes
highlights.body: 16-day smartwatch mode battery life and 80+ hours of GPS-on activity tracking is something no Apple or Samsung product matches. For ultramarathoners, multi-day backpackers, and serious cyclists, the Fenix 8 is the unambiguous pick despite the higher price.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra May 6 firmware finally delivers 60+ hour battery
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update on the Watch 7 Ultra fixed the always-on display battery drain that was the last open complaint. With that fixed Samsung now delivers genuine 60+ hour battery life, which is what their marketing promised at launch and finally matches.

zh-tw.commentary:
Apple Watch Ultra 2 第一名守住，精準雙頻 GPS、品類最強錶上 App 生態圈、5/6 watchOS 更新加上基於血流的水分代謝指標，這個規格組合對 Apple 生態圈買家還是首選。Apple Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 Ultra 2 殺到 $749（原 $799），是今年非黑五最低價。

台灣公司貨 Apple Watch Ultra 2 NT$25,900 起，戶外運動跟商務人士買得最多。

第二名 Garmin Fenix 8 還是要多週電池續航跟品類最深運動指標的人首選，Garmin Connect IQ 店是 Apple 以外最強的智慧錶生態圈。

第三名 Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 是 Android 選擇，5/6 韌體更新後續航終於真的能跑超過 60 小時。

第四名 Google Pixel Watch 4 是 Android 性價比段選擇。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，智慧錶市場穩定，Apple 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死價值論述，Samsung 的續航韌體修補是這週品類最重要的更新。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 $749 是今年非黑五最低
highlights.body: Apple Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 春季所有促銷。雙頻精準 GPS 加 watchOS App 生態加新的水分代謝指標在 $749（約 NT$23,600）整個價值論述完全壓死，Apple 生態圈買家直接下手。

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 多週電池續航是戶外運動員無可爭議首選
highlights.body: 智慧錶模式 16 天續航加 GPS 啟用 80 小時以上運動追蹤，Apple 跟 Samsung 都做不到。超馬選手、多日縱走、認真自行車手，Fenix 8 是首選毫無懸念，雖然較貴。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 5/6 韌體終於做到 60 小時以上續航
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體更新讓 Watch 7 Ultra 修掉 always-on 顯示耗電問題，是最後一個沒解的抱怨。修完之後 Samsung 終於做到 60 小時以上續航，跟上市行銷話術終於對得上。

en.commentary: NordicTrack Commercial 1750 keeps first because the iFit subscription content library, the 12% incline plus -3% decline range, and the genuinely commercial-grade build are still the spec combination that closes the case for serious home runners. NordicTrack's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the Commercial 1750 at $1,799 (regular $2,299), which is the cheapest it has been since launch. Sole F80 at second remains the right answer for buyers who specifically refuse subscription content and want a no-nonsense quality treadmill. Peloton Tread 22 at third is still the right answer for buyers who already use Peloton bikes and want studio class consistency. Bowflex Treadmill 22 at fourth is the niche pick for buyers who specifically want the JRNY content library. The 5/8 read is that the treadmill market is stable heading into the post-summer fitness commitment cycle, NordicTrack's Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and there is no meaningful category news this week.

highlights.title: NordicTrack Commercial 1750 at $1,799 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: NordicTrack's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale by a wide margin. iFit content plus 12% incline plus -3% decline plus commercial-grade build at $1,799 closes the value argument decisively for serious home runners. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Sole F80 is the right call for buyers who refuse subscription content
highlights.body: No-subscription model plus genuinely commercial-grade build at $1,599 closes the case for buyers who want quality treadmill hardware without monthly fees. The F80 build quality matches the Commercial 1750 even though the screen experience is intentionally minimal.

highlights.title: Peloton Tread 22 only makes sense if you already use Peloton bikes
highlights.body: Peloton's content library is genuinely best-in-class for studio fitness, but the value math only works if the user is already paying the All-Access membership for a Peloton bike. For new Peloton households the bike-first path is more cost-effective.

zh-tw.commentary:
NordicTrack Commercial 1750 第一名守住，iFit 訂閱內容庫、12% 上坡加 -3% 下坡區間、商用級工藝品質，這個規格組合對認真在家跑步的買家還是首選。NordicTrack Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 Commercial 1750 殺到 $1,799（原 $2,299），是上市以來最低。

台灣這個品類規模小，公司貨 Commercial 1750 NT$79,900 上下，獨立屋有空間放跑步機的買家才會買，社區大樓用戶通常去健身房。

第二名 Sole F80 還是特別拒絕訂閱內容、要無噱頭品質跑步機的人首選。

第三名 Peloton Tread 22 是已經用 Peloton 飛輪、要工作室課程一致體驗的人首選。

第四名 Bowflex Treadmill 22 是特別要 JRNY 內容庫的 niche 選擇。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，跑步機市場踩進夏季後健身意願週期，NordicTrack 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死價值論述，這週沒有有意義的品類新聞。

highlights.title: NordicTrack Commercial 1750 $1,799 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: NordicTrack Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 春季所有促銷一大截。iFit 內容加 12% 上坡加 -3% 下坡加商用級工藝在 $1,799（約 NT$56,700）整個價值論述完全壓死，認真在家跑步的買家直接下手。Memorial Day 也不會更便宜。

highlights.title: Sole F80 是拒絕訂閱內容買家正確選擇
highlights.body: 免訂閱模式加商用級工藝在 $1,599（約 NT$50,400）對要品質跑步機硬體不要月費的買家是正確選擇。F80 工藝品質追上 Commercial 1750，雖然螢幕體驗刻意做得簡單。

highlights.title: Peloton Tread 22 只有已經用 Peloton 飛輪才合理
highlights.body: Peloton 內容庫真的是工作室健身品類最強，但價值算數只有用戶已經付 All-Access 會員費（給 Peloton 飛輪用）才合理。新進 Peloton 家庭走「先買飛輪」路徑成本效益更好。

en.commentary: Eufy Video Doorbell E340 keeps first because the dual-camera system showing both the visitor and the package zone, the no-subscription-required local storage, and the 2K HDR resolution are still the spec combination that closes the case for any privacy-conscious buyer. Eufy's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the E340 at $179.99 (regular $199.99), which is the cheapest it has been since launch. Aqara Doorbell Camera Hub G410 at second remains the right answer for buyers who want HomeKit Secure Video integration with local processing. Google Nest Doorbell (Wired, 2nd Gen) at third is the Google Home ecosystem pick that genuinely produces the best AI-detection package among cloud-subscription doorbells. Ring Battery Doorbell Pro at fourth is the Ring ecosystem pick. The 5/8 read is that the video doorbell market is stable, Eufy's Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and the only real category news is Aqara announcing G420 successor for Q3.

highlights.title: Eufy Video Doorbell E340 at $179.99 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Eufy's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale. Dual-camera package-zone view plus no-subscription local storage plus 2K HDR at $180 closes the value argument decisively for privacy-conscious buyers. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Aqara Doorbell G410 is the only HomeKit Secure Video pick worth buying
highlights.body: HomeKit Secure Video with local processing is something only Aqara ships at this price tier. For Apple Home ecosystem buyers who refuse to send doorbell footage to the cloud, the G410 is the unambiguous pick despite the more limited AI detection.

highlights.title: Google Nest Doorbell AI detection is best-in-class with Nest Aware subscription
highlights.body: Google's AI-detection package genuinely produces the lowest false-positive rate among cloud-subscription doorbells, but the full feature set requires Nest Aware at $8/month. For Google Home households that already pay for Nest Aware, this is the unambiguous pick.

zh-tw.commentary:
Eufy Video Doorbell E340 第一名守住，雙鏡頭系統同時顯示訪客跟包裹區、免訂閱在地儲存、2K HDR 解析度，這個規格組合對重視隱私的買家還是首選。Eufy Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 E340 殺到 $179.99（原 $199.99），是上市以來最低。

台灣公司貨 Eufy E340 NT$5,690 上下，獨立屋跟透天有電鈴改裝的需求買得最多，免訂閱這件事在台灣消費者心裡很重要。

第二名 Aqara Doorbell Camera Hub G410 是想要 HomeKit Secure Video 整合加在地處理的人首選。

第三名 Google Nest Doorbell (Wired, 2nd Gen) 是 Google Home 生態圈選擇，雲端訂閱門鈴中 AI 偵測最強。

第四名 Ring Battery Doorbell Pro 是 Ring 生態圈選擇。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，門鈴市場穩定，Eufy 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死價值論述，這週唯一品類新聞是 Aqara 公告 G420 後繼款 Q3 上市。

highlights.title: Eufy E340 $179.99 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: Eufy Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 春季所有促銷。雙鏡頭包裹區視角加免訂閱在地儲存加 2K HDR 在 $180（約 NT$5,670）整個價值論述完全壓死，重視隱私的買家直接下手。

highlights.title: Aqara G410 是 HomeKit Secure Video 唯一值得買的選擇
highlights.body: HomeKit Secure Video 加在地處理這件事，這個價位帶只有 Aqara 做。Apple Home 生態圈拒絕把門鈴影像上雲端的買家，G410 是首選毫無懸念，雖然 AI 偵測較少。

highlights.title: Google Nest Doorbell AI 偵測搭 Nest Aware 訂閱是品類最強
highlights.body: Google AI 偵測套件在雲端訂閱門鈴裡誤判率最低，但完整功能要 Nest Aware 月費 $8（約 NT$252）。已經付 Nest Aware 的 Google Home 家庭，這是首選毫無懸念。

en.commentary: Mullvad VPN keeps first because the no-account-required model with anonymous payment, the flat €5/month pricing without misleading multi-year discounts, and the genuinely independent third-party audits are still the combination that closes the case for any privacy-first buyer. ProtonVPN at second remains the right answer for buyers who want a more conventional account-based VPN with the ProtonMail and ProtonDrive ecosystem integration, and ProtonVPN's May 6 update added the new Stealth protocol that finally bypasses China and Iran censorship reliably. NordVPN at third is the right answer for buyers who specifically need streaming geo-unlock breadth, and NordVPN unblocks more streaming services in more regions than any competitor. ExpressVPN at fourth is the casual-user pick. Surfshark at five is the value tier pick. The 5/8 read is that the VPN market is stable, Mullvad's pricing model continues to win on the math, and ProtonVPN's Stealth protocol fix is genuinely the most consequential category update of the week.

highlights.title: Mullvad's flat €5/month pricing wins on math against multi-year competitors
highlights.body: Most VPN competitors require 2-year or 3-year commitments to hit advertised pricing, which compounds risk if the company changes ownership or policy. Mullvad's flat €5/month with no commitment beats the math on every realistic usage horizon for buyers who actually plan to use the VPN long-term.

highlights.title: ProtonVPN May 6 Stealth protocol finally bypasses China and Iran censorship
highlights.body: The May 6 update added the new Stealth protocol that survives deep-packet inspection in heavily censored networks. For travelers and journalists who actually need a VPN that works in China, Iran, and Russia, ProtonVPN is now the unambiguous pick.

highlights.title: NordVPN is still the only VPN for streaming geo-unlock breadth
highlights.body: NordVPN unblocks more streaming services in more regions than any competitor, and for buyers whose primary use case is watching shows that are licensed differently in different markets, NordVPN is the unambiguous pick despite the marketing-heavy pricing model.

zh-tw.commentary:
Mullvad VPN 第一名守住，免帳號模式加匿名付款、€5/月平價沒有誤導性多年折扣、真正獨立的第三方稽核，這個組合對隱私優先買家還是首選。

台灣用戶用 VPN 多半是要看 Netflix 跨區或回避公司網路限制，Mullvad 在「就是要用就付月費」的情境下 €5/月（約 NT$170）真的好懂，不用簽兩年三年合約。

第二名 ProtonVPN 還是想要 Proton 帳號生態（ProtonMail、ProtonDrive）的人首選，5/6 更新加上 Stealth 協定終於穩定繞過中國跟伊朗審查。

第三名 NordVPN 是需要 Netflix 跨區解鎖廣度的人首選，解鎖串流服務的數量跟地區範圍沒有對手。

第四名 ExpressVPN 是輕度用戶選擇。

第五名 Surfshark 是性價比段選擇。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，VPN 市場穩定，Mullvad 的定價模式在數學上持續贏，ProtonVPN 的 Stealth 協定修補是這週品類最重要的更新。

highlights.title: Mullvad €5/月平價在數學上贏多年合約對手
highlights.body: 大多數 VPN 對手要 2 年或 3 年合約才能達到行銷定價，公司易主或政策變更時風險就累積起來。Mullvad €5/月（約 NT$170）不簽約模式，對真的長期會用 VPN 的買家在所有實際使用週期上算下來都贏。

highlights.title: ProtonVPN 5/6 Stealth 協定終於繞過中國伊朗審查
highlights.body: 5/6 更新加上 Stealth 協定能在深度封包檢測的高審查網路存活。常出差到中國、伊朗、俄羅斯，又真的需要 VPN 能用的買家（記者、特派員），ProtonVPN 現在是首選毫無懸念。

highlights.title: NordVPN 還是 Netflix 跨區解鎖廣度唯一選擇
highlights.body: NordVPN 解鎖串流服務的數量跟地區範圍沒有對手。主要用途是看不同市場授權不同的影集的買家，NordVPN 是首選毫無懸念，雖然定價模式比較行銷導向。

en.commentary: Sony WF-1000XM6 keeps first because the QN3e processor's adaptive ANC, the new Auto Switch feature that finally makes multi-device use seamless, and the May 6 firmware update that added the per-ear EQ calibration are still the spec combination that closes the case for any premium wireless earbud buyer. Sony's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the WF-1000XM6 at $279.99 (regular $329.99), which is the cheapest it has been since launch. Apple AirPods Pro 2 at second remains the right answer for buyers who live entirely in the Apple ecosystem and want the seamless device handoff that no third-party earbud matches. Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II at third still produces the highest noise floor reduction in steady-state environments. Sennheiser Momentum True Wireless 4 at four is the audiophile-leaning pick. The 5/8 read is that the premium wireless earbud market is stable, Sony's Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and the per-ear EQ calibration firmware is genuinely the most consequential category update of the week.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 at $279.99 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Sony's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale by a wide margin. QN3e adaptive ANC plus the new Auto Switch plus per-ear EQ calibration at $280 closes the value argument decisively for any premium wireless earbud buyer. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Apple AirPods Pro 2 wins only on Apple ecosystem device handoff
highlights.body: Seamless multi-device handoff between iPhone, iPad, MacBook, and Apple Watch is something no third-party earbud matches. For Apple-ecosystem buyers this is the unambiguous pick. Everyone else should buy the Sony WF-1000XM6 at the lower price.

highlights.title: Sony May 6 per-ear EQ calibration firmware is genuinely a meaningful unlock
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update on the WF-1000XM6 added per-ear EQ calibration that compensates for asymmetric ear-canal acoustics. For buyers whose left and right ear hear different frequency profiles (which is most people), this is genuinely the most useful EQ feature shipped in any earbud this year.

zh-tw.commentary:
Sony WF-1000XM6 第一名守住，QN3e 處理器的自適應降噪、新的 Auto Switch 多裝置切換終於做順、5/6 韌體更新加上左右耳獨立 EQ 校準，這個規格組合對旗艦無線耳機買家還是首選。Sony Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 WF-1000XM6 殺到 $279.99（原 $329.99），是上市以來最低。

台灣公司貨 WF-1000XM6 NT$8,990 起，捷運通勤族跟出差族用得最多。

第二名 Apple AirPods Pro 2 還是 Apple 生態圈買家首選，無縫裝置切換是第三方耳機都做不到的。

第三名 Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II 還是穩態環境噪音底壓得最低的。

第四名 Sennheiser Momentum True Wireless 4 是發燒友取向選擇。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，旗艦無線耳機市場穩定，Sony 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死價值論述，左右耳獨立 EQ 校準韌體是這週品類最重要的更新。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 $279.99 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: Sony Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 春季所有促銷一大截。QN3e 自適應降噪加新版 Auto Switch 加左右耳獨立 EQ 校準在 $280（約 NT$8,800）整個價值論述完全壓死，旗艦無線耳機買家直接下手。Memorial Day 也不會更便宜。

highlights.title: Apple AirPods Pro 2 只在 Apple 生態圈裝置切換贏
highlights.body: iPhone、iPad、MacBook、Apple Watch 之間無縫切換這件事第三方耳機都做不到。Apple 生態圈買家首選毫無懸念。其他人直接 Sony WF-1000XM6 便宜的價碼買就對了。

highlights.title: Sony 5/6 左右耳獨立 EQ 校準韌體真的有用
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體更新讓 WF-1000XM6 加上左右耳獨立 EQ 校準，補償耳道不對稱的聲學差異。左右耳聽到頻響不一樣的人（大部分人都這樣），這是今年所有耳機推送的 EQ 功能裡最有用的。
